title: Declare Network Policy — Limit access to thenginxservice
text:
To limit the access to the
nginx
service so that only Pods with the label
access: true
can query it, create a NetworkPolicy object as follows:
apiVersion
:
networking.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
NetworkPolicy
metadata
:
name
:
access-nginx
spec
:
podSelector
:
matchLabels
:
app
:
nginx
ingress
:
-
from
:
-
podSelector
:
matchLabels
:
access
:
"true"
The name of a NetworkPolicy object must be a valid
DNS subdomain name
.
